parsing_res_list.block_content: The diagram shows a system where users can upload documents through the user interface. Uploaded documents can go through compression, format conversion or OCR and preprocessing depending on the user input. After performing the specified task the file is saved to where the original file is located, where the user can access it.

rec_texts: The diagram shows a system where users can upload documents through the user
interface. Uploaded documents can go through compression, format conversion or
OCR and preprocessing depending on the user input. After performing the specified
task the file is saved to where the original file is located, where the user can access it.
